name: Thaao Penghlis's Greek Wedding Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Using an electric mixer, beat butter and 1/3 cup powdered sugar until fluffy.
3. Add egg yolk and brandy; beat until thick as mayonnaise.
4. Gradually add flour, beating until smooth.
5. Flour hands. Pinch off small pieces of dough to form round balls about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
6. Arrange cookies well apart on an ungreased cookie sheet; place a clove in the center of each.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
8. On a sheet of waxed paper, pour a thick bed of powdered sugar (about 1 cup).
9. Using a spatula, gently transfer hot cookies onto the sugar as soon as they are removed from the oven.
10. Pour more sugar on tops and sides.
11. Cool at least 4 hours before transferring to a serving dish.
12. Sprinkle with additional powdered sugar so shortbread is completely covered.
